jobs.title: Kiswahili Audio Translation & Transcription
jobs.description:
I have a conversational recording in Kiswahili that runs a little under an hour, and I need it turned into clear, reliable text for my lesson material. Your task is two-fold: produce an accurate Kiswahili transcript with speaker labels, then provide a fluent English translation presented side by side. Idiomatic accuracy matters because students will rely on the text to grasp real-world usage.

You will receive one MP3 file (about 45–55 minutes). Please keep everything confidential, work directly from the audio, and avoid machine-generated output unless you do a full human review afterward.
